title: BEM-622 internal contour report
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

items={
 'operator_request':'operator_chat_request',
 'curator_intake':'governance/curator/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'role_orchestrator_package':'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'internal_task':'governance/internal_contour/tasks/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'analyst_plan_json':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem605_hourly_report_template_plan.json',
 'analyst_plan_md':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem605_hourly_report_template_plan.md',
 'auditor_inbox':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_audit.json',
 'claude_mailbox':'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem605_hourly_report_template_review_request.md',
 'provider_gate_required':'governance/provider_gates/bem605_provider_gate_required.json',
 'provider_gate_recovery':'governance/provider_gates/bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery.json',
 'provider_gate_workflow':'governance/reports/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_workflow.md',
 'provider_gate_fix':'governance/reports/bem609_fix_provider_gate_yaml_and_commit_steps.md',
 'provider_route_decision':'governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json',
 'reserve_audit':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem612_reserve_audit_hourly_report_template.json',
 'executor_item':'governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox/bem612_execute_hourly_report_canon.json',
 'renderer':'scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py',
 'curator_hourly_workflow':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
 'delivery_recorder':'scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py',
 'workflow_no_heredoc_fix':'governance/reports/bem614_fix_hourly_workflow_no_heredoc.md',
 'static_selftest':'governance/state/bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe.json',
 'live_trigger':'governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger',
 'live_check':'governance/state/bem621_live_hourly_delivery_post_trigger_check.json',
 'monitoring_report':'governance/reports/bem619_full_monitoring_report_hourly_pipeline.md',
 'conflict_policy':'governance/protocols/WORKFLOW_CONFLICT_SAFE_COMMIT_POLICY.md'
}

def exists(path):
    if path=='operator_chat_request':
        return True, 0
    p=Path(path)
    return p.exists(), p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0

def load_json(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {}

def text(path,limit=700):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return ''
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:limit]

status={k:{'path':v,'exists':exists(v)[0],'size':exists(v)[1]} for k,v in items.items()}
route=load_json(items['provider_route_decision'])
selftest=load_json(items['static_selftest'])
live=load_json(items['live_check'])

steps=[
 {'n':1,'role':'Operator','adapter':'Chat message','input':'Request to redesign hourly Telegram monitoring report and run full contour','output':'Task accepted into BEM-605','evidence':'conversation + governance/curator/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json','result':'PASS'},
 {'n':2,'role':'Curator / GPT','adapter':'Deno /codex-task -> codex-runner -> Python executor','input':'Operator request','output':'curator intake JSON','evidence':items['curator_intake'],'result':'PASS' if status['curator_intake']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':3,'role':'Registrar / Role Orchestrator','adapter':'file-based route package','input':'curator intake','output':'role_orchestrator inbox package','evidence':items['role_orchestrator_package'],'result':'PASS' if status['role_orchestrator_package']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':4,'role':'Internal Task Registry','adapter':'governance/internal_contour/tasks JSON','input':'role package','output':'internal task for analyst','evidence':items['internal_task'],'result':'PASS' if status['internal_task']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':5,'role':'Analyst / GPT','adapter':'Python executor writes analyst plan','input':'internal task','output':'template plan + questions for Claude','evidence':items['analyst_plan_json'],'result':'PASS' if status['analyst_plan_json']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':6,'role':'Auditor / Claude target','adapter':'repo mailbox gpt_to_claude','input':'analyst plan','output':'mailbox request to Claude','evidence':items['claude_mailbox'],'result':'PASS_REQUEST_CREATED' if status['claude_mailbox']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':7,'role':'Provider Gate','adapter':'provider_gates JSON + GitHub workflow candidate','input':'need Claude primary check','output':'route decision primary/reserve','evidence':items['provider_route_decision'],'result':'PASS_ROUTE_RECORDED' if status['provider_route_decision']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':8,'role':'Auditor / GPT Reserve','adapter':'internal_contour/auditor/reports','input':'Claude runtime not proven in time','output':'reserve audit approved with changes','evidence':items['reserve_audit'],'result':'PASS_RESERVE_USED' if status['reserve_audit']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':9,'role':'Executor','adapter':'Deno/Codex/Python executor','input':'executor item from reserve audit','output':'renderer + workflow implementation','evidence':items['renderer']+' + '+items['curator_hourly_workflow'],'result':'PASS' if status['renderer']['exists'] and status['curator_hourly_workflow']['exists'] else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':10,'role':'Executor selftest','adapter':'static selftest via Python executor constraints','input':'renderer/workflow files','output':'BEM-617 selftest PASS','evidence':items['static_selftest'],'result':'PASS' if selftest.get('status')=='pass' else 'FAIL'},
 {'n':11,'role':'Live delivery monitor','adapter':'trigger file + curator-hourly-report workflow','input':'live trigger after fixes','output':'delivery state check','evidence':items['live_check'],'result':live.get('status','UNKNOWN')},
 {'n':12,'role':'Monitoring reporter','adapter':'diagnosis report','input':'all artifacts','output':'full monitoring report','evidence':items['monitoring_report'],'result':'PASS' if status['monitoring_report']['exists'] else 'FAIL'}
]

architecture_findings=[
 {'area':'Curator entry','expected':'Operator task enters through curator, not directly into executor','actual':'Curator intake was created first','match':True,'evidence':items['curator_intake']},
 {'area':'Role orchestration','expected':'Curator passes to registrar/orchestrator, then internal contour','actual':'Role-orchestrator package and internal task were created','match':status['role_orchestrator_package']['exists'] and status['internal_task']['exists'],'evidence':items['role_orchestrator_package']},
 {'area':'Analyst role','expected':'GPT Analyst prepares plan before audit/execution','actual':'Analyst plan exists and includes proposed template/questions','match':status['analyst_plan_json']['exists'],'evidence':items['analyst_plan_json']},
 {'area':'Claude primary auditor','expected':'Claude should audit when primary provider is available','actual':'Claude mailbox request was created, but no proven Claude runtime response was used in this chain','match':False,'evidence':items['claude_mailbox']},
 {'area':'Provider gate','expected':'System records primary/reserve choice before fallback','actual':'Provider gate and route decision were recorded; selected provider was '+str(route.get('selected_provider')),'match':status['provider_route_decision']['exists'],'evidence':items['provider_route_decision']},
 {'area':'Reserve fallback','expected':'If Claude unavailable/not proven, GPT reserve may continue with explicit proof','actual':'GPT reserve audit was used and recorded','match':status['reserve_audit']['exists'],'evidence':items['reserve_audit']},
 {'area':'Executor','expected':'Executor implements only after audit/route decision','actual':'Renderer implementation followed reserve audit/executor item','match':status['executor_item']['exists'] and status['renderer']['exists'],'evidence':items['executor_item']},
 {'area':'Selftest','expected':'Implementation must be checked','actual':'BEM-617 static selftest passed after adapting to executor constraints','match':selftest.get('status')=='pass','evidence':items['static_selftest']},
 {'area':'Telegram live delivery','expected':'Runtime delivery should be confirmed','actual':'Live delivery was checked but not confirmed as sent in repo state: '+str(live.get('status')),'match':False,'evidence':items['live_check']},
]

risks=[
 {'risk':'Claude primary contour not fully proven','impact':'Cannot claim main Claude auditor/executor worked for this task','mitigation':'Add mandatory Claude smoke that writes a Claude-authored response before choosing primary.'},
 {'risk':'Workflow push triggers can fail silently or appear as stale Gmail failure noise','impact':'Operator sees old failures and cannot distinguish current state','mitigation':'Store run status/state and supersede old runs; reduce parallel writes; do live state checks.'},
 {'risk':'Live Telegram delivery not confirmed','impact':'New report format may be implemented but not yet delivered','mitigation':'Keep BEM-621 blocker until state shows telegram_delivery=sent.'},
 {'risk':'Executor sandbox restrictions cause script failures','impact':'Selftests using forbidden constructs fail despite business logic being valid','mitigation':'Keep executor-safe coding subset documented: no exec call, no Exception as e in tasks, no forbidden module words.'}
]

summary_status='completed_with_reserve_fallback_and_delivery_pending'
blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_PRIMARY_AND_LIVE_DELIVERY_NOT_FULLY_PROVEN','message':'Internal contour executed through GPT reserve; Claude primary runtime and live Telegram delivery are not fully proven for this task.'}

obj={'schema_version':'internal_contour_deep_audit_report.v1','bem':'BEM-622','scope':'BEM-605..621 hourly Telegram monitoring report redesign','status':summary_status,'provider_route':route,'steps':steps,'architecture_findings':architecture_findings,'risks':risks,'artifact_status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:58 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem622_internal_contour_deep_audit_report.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(obj,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

md=[]
md.append('# BEM-622 | Detailed Internal Contour Audit Report')
md.append('')
md.append('Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:58 (UTC+3)')
md.append('')
md.append('## Verdict')
md.append('Внутренний контур прошёл задачу полностью по file-based архитектуре, но основной Claude Code контур не доказан как реально использованный. Исполнение пошло через GPT reserve, что было зафиксировано provider gate. Live Telegram delivery нового hourly отчёта пока не подтверждён как sent.')
md.append('')
md.append('## Provider route')
md.append('- provider_checked: '+str(route.get('provider_checked')))
md.append('- primary_provider: '+str(route.get('primary_provider')))
md.append('- reserve_provider: '+str(route.get('reserve_provider')))
md.append('- selected_provider: '+str(route.get('selected_provider')))
md.append('- reserve_used: '+str(route.get('reserve_used')))
md.append('- reason: '+str(route.get('reason')))
md.append('- proof: '+items['provider_route_decision'])
md.append('')
md.append('## Step-by-step chain')
for s in steps:
    md.append('### '+str(s['n'])+'. '+s['role'])
    md.append('- Adapter/tool: '+s['adapter'])
    md.append('- Input: '+s['input'])
    md.append('- Output: '+s['output'])
    md.append('- Evidence: '+s['evidence'])
    md.append('- Result: '+s['result'])
    md.append('')
md.append('## Architecture compliance')
for f in architecture_findings:
    md.append('- '+f['area']+': '+('MATCH' if f['match'] else 'GAP')+' | expected: '+f['expected']+' | actual: '+f['actual']+' | evidence: '+f['evidence'])
md.append('')
md.append('## Risks / gaps')
for r in risks:
    md.append('- Risk: '+r['risk']+' | Impact: '+r['impact']+' | Mitigation: '+r['mitigation'])
md.append('')
md.append('## Blocker')
md.append(json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))
report=reports/'bem622_internal_contour_deep_audit_report.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(md)+sep)

record={'record_type':'bem622_internal_contour_deep_audit_report','cycle_id':'bem622-internal-contour-deep-audit-report','source':'gpt_auditor','status':summary_status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'selected_provider':route.get('selected_provider'),'reserve_used':route.get('reserve_used'),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:58 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        contour_state={}
contour_state['bem622_internal_contour_deep_audit_report']={'status':summary_status,'report':str(report),'state_file':str(state_file),'selected_provider':route.get('selected_provider'),'reserve_used':route.get('reserve_used'),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:58 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem622_internal_contour_deep_audit_report.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-622: detailed internal contour audit report created. status='+summary_status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created detailed internal contour audit report with roles, tools, transitions, provider route, failures, fallback, and architecture compliance')
